pkgmetadata.longdescription: pyogrio provides a vectorized spatial vector file format I/O engine using GDAL/OGR. It is designed as a high-performance replacement for Fiona, offering faster reading and writing of geospatial data formats such as Shapefiles, GeoPackages, GeoJSON, and many more.
pyogrio 提供基于 GDAL/OGR 的矢量空间数据文件格式 I/O 引擎。 它被设计为 Fiona 的高性能替代品，提供对 Shapefile、GeoPackage、 GeoJSON 等地理空间数据格式更快速的读写操作。
